title: 'Free Visa for everyone' if Neeraj Chopra wins Gold in Paris Olympics, promises Indian-origin CEO of this US-based startup - The Times of India
description: Tech News : The CEO of Atlys, Mohak Nahta, pledged on LinkedIn to offer free visas to all users for one day if Neeraj Chopra wins a gold medal at the Paris Olympi
keywords: US-based startup,Paris Olympics,Neeraj Chopra,Mohak Nahta,Indian-origin CEO,gold medal,free visa,Atlys
